name: Honkai: Star Rail RPG
description:
Climb aboard the Astral Express - the train that is the latest creation of the Aeon of the Path of Trailblaze - Akivili. Become a wanderer through the stars. Save the galaxy from the inevitable fate of Destruction and Chaos.

Reach the end of the story in your own way, Trailblazer!

(Author note: Huge thanks to all of you who is using this bot, as well as supporting the Path of the Trailblaze(or perhaps you are a follower of another path in the galaxy). In the end all that matters - is that you keep moving forward, no matter what may await you in this long journey, full of adventures and dangers in each step.)
creator: AvatarLevap
